description: A combined tactical alpha score (1-100), calculated as a weighted integration of the reversal, momentum, liquidity, and seasonality component scores, reflecting the overall short-term return potential for the stock
A percentile-ranked score (1-100) representing short-term momentum signals for a stock, with higher scores suggesting stronger recent price momentum that might persist
A percentile-ranked score (1-100) measuring the extent of recent liquidity events or microstructure shocks for a stock, with higher values indicating a stronger liquidity-driven potential for alpha

A percentile-ranked score (1-100) indicating the degree to which a stock is expected to experience price reversal or mean-reversion, with higher values suggesting greater likelihood of outperformance due to reversal effects
A percentile-ranked score (1-100) capturing seasonal or calendar-based effects which may impact a stock's short-term returns; higher scores indicate stronger positive seasonality signals
